PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR ORDER THAT MATTERS IN REQUEST FOR ADMISSION OF TRUTH OF FACTS BK DEEMED ADMITTED.
Off Calendar Aug-13-2024 Off Calendar

Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Bk Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Aug-13-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A.'s Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Bk Deemed Admitted.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff alleges that it is the owner of an AMEX credit card account in defendant's name on which an unpaid balance exists in the amount of $7,728.53. Plaintiff has filed a collection action, and defendant has filed an answer.

On April 3, 2024 plaintiff served a Request for Admissions on defendant to which defendant has not responded. As a result, plaintiff filed the instant motion for an order deeming the admissions served on defendant admitted.

Given defendant's failure to timely respond to the Request for Admissions propounded by plaintiff, not to mention his failure to respond to the instant motion, for good cause shown, plaintiff's motion for an order deeming its Request for Admissions admitted is GRANTED.
Plaintiff's counsel is directed to prepare a proposed order consistent with the tentative ruling and submit it to psw@hassard.com for review and signature.

Judge Pro Tem: Philip Ward. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (525/JPT)

Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Bk Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Jul-16-2024 Continued To Aug-13-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
